functions.title: Guide Book #101
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #101§r
§lScrollwright§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Neutral
•§lMob type§r: Spellcaster, Magical, Villager, Trader, Humanoid.
•§lSpawns in§r: Villager Libraries
•§lHealth§r: 30

•§lWalk speed§r: 0.3
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Learning Books
•§lPossible drops§r: Empty Scroll, Guide Book, Learning Book of Scrollwright, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r: Monsters, Sculk blocks.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Illager,

Vex, Zombie.
•§lRange attack§r: Magic Scroll Missile
•§lProjectile damage§r: 6
•§lProjectile effect§r: Slowness §o(0:30)§r
•Can sleep in a bed at night and responds to bells.
•Can trade with players.
•Can resupply trades by interacting

with a nearby Magic Spells Table.
•Can transform into another villager type when given a §lLearning Book§r.
